author: GoMapur
text: As the title suggests, in the current doc there's no suggestion that cursor.lastrowid exists.[Doc](http://pymysql.readthedocs.io/en/latest/modules/cursors.html) But when I looked into the code I found it in [here](https://github.com/PyMySQL/PyMySQL/blob/master/pymysql/cursors.py#L333). Thus I believe we should add it to the doc to remind ppl there's a safe and efficient way to retrieve last operation's row id.

author: GoMapur
text: Hi I just saw the similar question [here](https://github.com/PyMySQL/PyMySQL/issues/571). I guess It's fine to leave the doc blank.
